title: Trusted tools drawer component for agent chat interface
purpose: Displays a sidebar drawer showing trusted tools for the current session and allows revoking them. Used in the agent chat UI to manage tool permissions.

steps.content: Extract the list of trusted tools from the agent store.
IF the drawer is not open, return null to render nothing.
Render the drawer UI with header, close button, and tool list.
IF no trusted tools exist, display a message indicating empty state.
ELSE render each trusted tool as a list item with revoke button.
